subcodes.first_line: O thou who hast turned thy face toward God! Thy letter was received, and grief was felt at the passing of thy mother. However, thou must not sorrow [3.5s]... ...O Thou forgiving God! Forgive the sins of my loving mother, pardon her shortcomings
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مقبل بخدا نامه ات رسید و از وفات والده ات تاسف حاصل گردید ولی تو محزون
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for parents, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @consolation and comfort, @prayer for forgiveness
